scope: TaskQueue claim/recovery/cancel query dialect only; task mutation locking and idempotency remain later P080 children.
done: Added task query helper for backend-specific claim candidate SQL.
Added task query helper for backend-specific stale recovery candidate SQL.
Added task query helper for backend-specific cancel candidate SQL.
Wired existing TaskQueue claim/recover/cancel paths through the helpers while preserving sqlite SQL behavior.
Postgres claim SQL uses native retry timestamp comparison, JSONB dependency readiness, stable ordering, and FOR UPDATE OF ts SKIP LOCKED.
Postgres stale recovery SQL uses native heartbeat timestamp comparison and FOR UPDATE OF ts, ls SKIP LOCKED.
Extended Postgres placeholder conversion to preserve JSONB ? operators whose right side is an identifier such as dep.step_name.
